prompt: Deep-stack leverage spot: more money and more streets stay behind. Choose the line that keeps leverage available instead of burning it early.
why_v1: Calling keeps deep-stack leverage alive; an early raise spends that extra maneuvering room too soon.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The deep-stack edge comes from preserving leverage, not cashing it out immediately.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This deeper stack wants to keep future pressure available instead of spending it on an early raise.
